theme.author: DevInfinix
theme.title: IOS Extended
theme.description:
Channel : https://t.me/devinfinix_labs_discussions Website : https://thesamstudios.pages.dev GitHub : https://github.com/DevInfinix
Designed by DevInfinix - A modern iOS-inspired layout for HyperOS devices.
